tasks.label: Build WAR (Use VSCode Tomcat Plugin)
args: $mvnCmd = $null; $mvn = Get-Command mvn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($mvn) { $mvnCmd = $mvn.Source } elseif (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\tools\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin\mvn.cmd") { $mvnCmd = "$env:USERPROFILE\tools\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin\mvn.cmd" }; if (-not $mvnCmd) { Write-Error "Maven not found. Please install Maven or add mvn to PATH."; exit 1 }; if (Test-Path ".\target") { Remove-Item -Path ".\target" -Recurse -Force }; & $mvnCmd clean package -DskipTests; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; $war = ".\target\java-web-json.war"; if (-not (Test-Path $war)) { Write-Error "WAR not found: $war"; exit 1 }; Write-Host "WAR built: ${workspaceFolder}\software-code\target\java-web-json.war"; Write-Host "Next: deploy/run this WAR from VSCode Tomcat plugin."

tasks.label: Build + Deploy WAR to Local Tomcat
args: $tomcatWebapps = "D:\software\apache-tomcat-10.1.49-windows-x64\apache-tomcat-10.1.49\webapps"; if (-not (Test-Path $tomcatWebapps)) { Write-Error "Tomcat webapps path not found: $tomcatWebapps"; exit 1 }; $mvnCmd = $null; $mvn = Get-Command mvn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($mvn) { $mvnCmd = $mvn.Source } elseif (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\tools\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin\mvn.cmd") { $mvnCmd = "$env:USERPROFILE\tools\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin\mvn.cmd" }; if (-not $mvnCmd) { Write-Error "Maven not found. Please install Maven or add mvn to PATH."; exit 1 }; if (Test-Path ".\target") { Remove-Item -Path ".\target" -Recurse -Force }; & $mvnCmd clean package -DskipTests; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; $war = ".\target\java-web-json.war"; if (-not (Test-Path $war)) { Write-Error "WAR not found: $war"; exit 1 }; $destWar = Join-Path $tomcatWebapps "java-web-json.war"; $destDir = Join-Path $tomcatWebapps "java-web-json"; if (Test-Path $destWar) { Remove-Item -Path $destWar -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if (Test-Path $destDir) { Remove-Item -Path $destDir -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Copy-Item -Path $war -Destination $destWar -Force; Write-Host "Deploy done: $destWar"; Write-Host "Open: http://localhost:8080/java-web-json/register.html"
